title: Product & Marketing Analyst (all genders) – Stage+ – Deutsche Grammophon GmbH
required_skills: 2-3+ years experience in product analytics and marketing analytics
Experience with Google Tag Manager, Mixpanel, Adjust and data visualization tools
Understanding of finance basics to match performance data to business metrics
Bachelor's degree in Marketing Analytics, Statistics, Data Science, or Business Administration
bonus_skills: Experience in platform / app / subscription-based environment
matched_skills: 2-3+ years marketing analytics experience (4+ years across multiple roles)
Finance basics / performance-to-business metrics (financial analytics, budget dashboards at HSBC)
Project management skills (Scrum, SAFe, cross-functional coordination)
Data visualization / dashboards (executive dashboards for 12 product lines, KPI framework design)
A/B testing & experiment design (bonus — explicitly in CV)
Campaign ROI analytics (matches responsibility: marketing campaign effectiveness and ROI)
Funnel & conversion analysis (matches responsibility: KPI dashboards and tracking)
missing_skills: Platform / app / subscription-based environment experience (e-commerce present but not streaming/SaaS)
core_responsibilities: Analyze large data sets to identify trends and patterns, delivering insights and recommendations to product and marketing teams
Develop and implement tracking concepts for website and mobile/TV apps
Conduct A/B tests to optimize user experience on Stage+ and marketing campaigns across channels
Analyze marketing campaign effectiveness and ROI; recommend optimizations
Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to track Stage+ KPIs
recommended_emphasis: Highlight A/B testing and experiment design experience prominently — directly required
Emphasize campaign ROI analytics and funnel analysis with concrete examples (e.g., Hapag-Lloyd customer journey, HSBC financial analytics)
Frame KPI dashboard and reporting experience (Minth Group executive dashboards) as product/marketing analytics output
Position e-commerce analytics background as adjacent to streaming/subscription context
Showcase cross-functional coordination as evidence of product development process collaboration
Quantify any tracking or data quality QA work to address the GTM/Mixpanel gap partially
